name: Fabric Thin Striped Shower Curtain - Room Essentials™
description:
Enhance the visual appeal of your bath space with this Fabric Thin Striped Shower Curtain from Room Essentials™. Showcasing thin stripes in rust, orange, gray and pink hues on a white background, this decorative shower curtain lends cheerful flair to your bathroom decor. Made of 100% recycled polyester, this printed shower curtain features a buttonhole top for quick installation, while the machine-washable design allows for easy cleaning when needed.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
